_doc: Voiceover for section 00b — canvas + chat overview. Camera pulls back from chatbox to wide overview, cursor drags a node from library to canvas, then pulls back to chatbox. Two voice beats: 'You can drag in nodes yourself' as the overview reveals + drag begins, and 'Or just chat with me' as the cursor returns to chat. No music — added at final stitch.

segments.text: You can drag nodes in yourself.
